image_prompts: Based on the attached image reference. Hyper-realistic cinematic live-action still frame, vertical 9:16. Fluffie (same main subject) is a young moss dragon: small bipedal creature covered in soft dense green moss-fur with tiny leaf tufts, flexible leafy spikes along the head/back/tail ridge, large glossy teal eyes with deep reflections, and pale stone-like belly scales. Inside an indoor American bobsled start house (Utah/Lake Placid vibe), Fluffie stands beside a glossy black bobsled, one clawed hand resting on the cockpit rim. Cold blue-gray ice floor, faint frosty haze, condensation on metal, sharp arena lights, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed moss texture and carbon-fiber surfaces, spectators and cameras blurred in the distance. No text, no subtitles, no logos, no readable brand names.
